---
title: "This is a test doc"
author: "Sam Csik"
date: "3/9/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

This is my first github page doc! I'm very excited!

## This is my header {.tabset}

### Tab1

This text should appear under tab 1

### Tab2

This is tab 2 text

I'm adding content here
